messages.messageText:
[image: Google]
You allowed Composio access to some of your Google Account data


julianloewenherz@gmail.com

If you didn’t allow Composio access to some of your Google Account data,
someone else may be trying to access your Google Account data.

Take a moment now to check your account activity and secure your account.
Check activity
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=julianloewenherz@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/alert/nt/1778718839000?rfn%3D127%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-8775704092390306904%26et%3D0>
To make changes at any time to the access that Composio has to your data,
go to your Google Account
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=julianloewenherz@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/connections/overview/AcBx0o4Q41WKTdIhUQCLxA5B8v5xhkKg1n7i7c9_j2GxR0JW0tdtJZcsMTzxiVEPVi0kDM6YNPOLdqHuX8FDSU7Eb4Q?utm_source%3Dsec_alert%26utm_medium%3Demail_notification%26force_all%3Dtrue>
You can also see security activity at
https://myaccount.google.com/notifications
You received this email to let you know about important changes to your
Google Account and services.
© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043, USA
